overall.description: First-person exploration of a dystopian futuristic city street in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit pyramid structures, massive holographic advertisements, and debris-filled underpasses in a hazy, overcast atmosphere. The camera moves steadily through wet streets with toxic green puddles, passing abandoned vehicles and elevated highways.

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street toward an underpass, observing the neon-lit pyramid structure on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic red car driving past on the street

tall palm trees lining the street ahead
elevated highway overpass spanning the street

tall building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet futuristic city street with a prominent green neon pyramid structure on the right. The street has glowing green toxic puddles and abandoned vehicles, with palm trees lining the road ahead. A futuristic car passes by on the right as the camera approaches a dark underpass.

events.description: entering dark concrete underpass with debris and wrecked vehicles
emerging from underpass into area with bright holographic lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a debris-filled underpass with wrecked cars and yellow barricades

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel with structural beams overhead
scattered rubble and trash along the path
bright yellow construction barriers with hazard stripes
bright light at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: Moving through a dark, enclosed concrete underpass littered with debris, wrecked vehicles, and yellow barricades. The space is dimly lit by artificial spotlights until emerging toward a brightly lit exit with holographic displays visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting underpass into open plaza with holographic billboards and ruined structures
turning left to view the large colorful holographic display on the building

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass and turning to observe a massive colorful holographic billboard on a ruined building

entered.detail: massive colorful digital advertisement display on building facade
derelict van with open rear doors
green pyramid structure visible in the distance
raised highway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into an open area dominated by a massive, colorful holographic billboard attached to ruined buildings. A striking red holographic beam projects upward nearby, and abandoned vehicles litter the ground as the camera pans to take in the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with neon structures

events.description: turning back to face the street and continuing forward along the sidewalk
passing underneath an overpass bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing abandoned vehicles and green barricades

entered.detail: neon green construction barriers lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a deserted street beneath an elevated highway, with the green neon pyramid structure visible on the right. The camera passes under multiple overpass bridges and alongside abandoned vehicles and green barricades, continuing down the hazy futuristic boulevard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit dystopian street that descends into a dark underpass before emerging into a vast, holographic plaza. It begins by gliding past a glowing green pyramid structure and toxic puddles, passing a futuristic car as the view narrows toward a dark concrete tunnel. As the camera enters the underpass, the environment shifts to a dimly lit corridor of debris and yellow barricades before the space opens up toward a bright, artificial light. The scene then expands into an open area dominated by a massive colorful holographic billboard and a striking red beam projecting upward from ruined buildings. Finally, the camera moves back onto a deserted boulevard beneath an elevated highway, passing under multiple overpass bridges while the green neon pyramid remains visible in the hazy distance.
